{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Valinhall chains
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The chains of [[Valinhall]] look like living black tattoos on the [[Incarnation]]'s arms.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
